sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel movement documentation found for SNES RPG with top-down exploration

special_mechanics.name: Demon Summoning Program
special_mechanics.description: Player character grants ability to summon demons via arm terminal device

special_mechanics.name: First-Person Dungeon Exploration
special_mechanics.description: First-person view for dungeon navigation; top-down 2D maps for outdoor areas

special_mechanics.name: Demon Fusion
special_mechanics.description: Two or three allied demons fused together with small chance of 'fusion accident'

tier_notes: T2 - Empirical/qualitative data only. Shin Megami Tensei II is a turn-based role-playing game with mixed first-person/top-down perspective, not a character action game. Movement physics parameters (jump, gravity, acceleration) are not mechanically significant or documented. Game focuses on turn-based dungeon exploration and demon recruitment/fusion systems rather than platforming or real-time movement mechanics.
sources_used: wikipedia - Shin Megami Tensei II gameplay description
